room.caption: [G6-DreamWoodsD] Maybe this is just to defer your attention.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(58)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh15MainA) dreamScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh15Dream)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backDreamWoods backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999 backFollow.image_xscale=1.88; backFollow.image_yscale=1.88
instance_create(x,y,oG6DreamWoodEf)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(606) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
